title: PublicDataNats
description: NATS subjects for the public-data ingestion service: webhook receipts, scrape/ingest jobs, normalized dataset facts, grants, evidence briefs, and downstream Spark/Airflow pipeline triggers.

$dd:nats.summary: Public research/government data ingestion, source scraping, grants discovery, analysis, and big-data pipeline handoff subjects.

subjects.name: PublicDataIngestRequests
subjects.description: Inbound public-data ingestion requests accepted over NATS. Payloads mirror the HTTP /ingest and /scrape contracts.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.public_data.ingest.requests

subjects.name: PublicDataIngestResults
subjects.description: Results emitted after public-data records, scrape results, or webhook receipts are normalized into the service ledger.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.public_data.ingest.results

subjects.name: PublicDataWebhookEvents
subjects.description: Raw-but-redacted webhook receipt events from public/primary data providers. Consumers should use this as an audit/event source, not the canonical dataset store.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.public_data.webhooks.events

subjects.name: PublicDataPipelineJobs
subjects.description: Spark/Airflow pipeline job intents generated from ingested public datasets, grants, trend/correlation analysis, and white-paper evidence briefs.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.public_data.pipeline.jobs

subjects.name: PublicDataAnalysisResults
subjects.description: Trend, correlation, grant-match, graph-data, model, and white-paper evidence results from public-data analysis runs.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.public_data.analysis.results

queueGroups.name: PublicDataWorkersQueueGroup
queueGroups.description: Shared queue group used by dd-public-data-server replicas so each queued ingest/scrape request is processed once.
